title: The Importance of Water Conservation
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text: Fresh water is becoming a (0) pressing global concern, as demand rises faster than natural sources can replenish. In many regions, water (17) scarcity is already a daily reality that affects millions of people. Industrial and agricultural (18) pollution of rivers and lakes further reduces the amount of clean water available for drinking. (19) Irresponsible use of water by both individuals and industries contributes to the rapid depletion of vital reserves. In some parts of the world, the lack of access to clean water has a (20) significant impact on public health and food production. The (21) conservation of water resources must become a global priority if future generations are to have enough clean water. Many countries now face (22) dangerous levels of water stress, particularly during summer droughts. Effective (23) management of water infrastructure, combined with better agricultural practices, can help greatly. Moving towards a more (24) sustainable model of water use is one of the greatest challenges facing humanity today.

example.text: Fresh water is becoming a (0) PRESSING global concern, as demand rises faster than natural sources can replenish. (PRESS)

questions.explanation: A noun is needed after 'water'; 'scarce' becomes 'scarcity' by changing '-ce' to '-city'.
A noun is needed before 'of rivers'; 'pollute' becomes 'pollution' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
A negative adjective is needed; the prefix 'ir-' is added to 'responsible' to mean 'not acting carefully'.
An adjective is needed before 'impact'; 'signify' becomes 'significant' by changing '-ify' to '-icant'.
A noun is needed after 'The'; 'conserve' becomes 'conservation' by replacing '-ve' with '-vation'.
An adjective is needed before 'levels'; 'danger' becomes 'dangerous' by adding the suffix '-ous'.
A noun is needed after 'Effective'; 'manage' becomes 'management' by adding the suffix '-ment'.
An adjective is needed before 'model'; 'sustain' becomes 'sustainable' by adding the suffix '-able'.
